---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Spatial Distance"
image: social-cards/spatial-distance.png
---

# 🏗️ Spatial Distance {#sec-spatial-distance}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Spatial Distance
:::

WIP

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
